summary_en: Nippon Rietec announced an update to its capital cost and stock price-conscious management strategy following a May 18, 2026 board review.
title_en: Update on Initiatives for Capital Cost and Stock Price-Conscious Management
translation_en_brief: Nippon Rietec Co., Ltd. (TSE Prime: 1938) issued an update on May 18, 2026 regarding its capital cost and stock price-conscious management initiatives. At a board meeting held on the same date, the company conducted a reassessment and evaluation of its current approach to capital allocation and shareholder returns. The disclosure announces updated policies and initiatives designed to improve capital efficiency and align management decisions more closely with both the company's cost of capital and market valuation. The specific details of the updated strategy and measures are included in the attached materials referenced in the notice.
